extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder Evaluations tab with an imported evaluation set and its test cases listed in a table. The evaluation rows display names, input summaries, expected outputs, and simulation-related columns, while a tooltip is open over the first row showing the full input for the Database_MSSQL case. The Evaluate set button is visible in the top-right, indicating the set is ready to be run or reviewed.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the evaluation set entries in Agent Builder, with the full input preview for the Database_MSSQL test case visible in a tooltip and the Evaluate set button available to run the evaluations.
